# Lists Note

## Unordered Lists

- First item
- Second item
  - Nested item
  - Another nested
- Third item

## Ordered Lists

1. First step
2. Second step
   1. Sub-step
   2. Another sub-step
3. Third step

## Task Lists

- [ ] Uncompleted task
- [x] Completed task
- [ ] Another task

## Mixed Lists

- Regular item
  1. Numbered sub-item
  2. Another numbered
- Another regular item
